# terrible_dellemc_unity_info (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `gather_subset` (String) List of string variables to specify the Unity storage system entities for which information is required.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `Array_Details` (String) Details of the Unity Array.
- `CIFS_Servers` (String) Details of the CIFS Servers.
- `Consistency_Groups` (String) Details of the Consistency Groups.
- `Disk_Groups` (String) Details of the disk groups.
- `Ethernet_ports` (String) Details of the ethernet ports.
- `FC_initiators` (String) Details of the FC initiators.
- `File_Systems` (String) Details of the File Systems.
- `File_interfaces` (String) Details of the file inetrfaces.
- `Hosts` (String) Details of the hosts.
- `ISCSI_initiators` (String) Details of the ISCSI initiators.
- `NAS_Servers` (String) Details of the NAS Servers.
- `NFS_Exports` (String) Details of the NFS Exports.
- `NFS_Servers` (String) Details of the NFS Servers.
- `Replication_sessions` (String) Details of the Replication sessions.
- `SMB_Shares` (String) Details of the SMB Shares.
- `Snapshot_Schedules` (String) Details of the Snapshot Schedules.
- `Snapshots` (String) Details of the Snapshots.
- `Storage_Pools` (String) Details of the Storage Pools.
- `Tree_Quotas` (String) Details of the quota trees.
- `User_Quotas` (String) Details of the user quotas.
- `Volumes` (String) Details of the Volumes.
- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
